text_blocks.text: Annual Grammy Awards, West walked on stage as Beck
was accepting his award for Album of the Year and then
walked off stage, making everyone think he was joking
around. After the awards show, West stated in an
interview that he was not joking and that "Beck needs to
respect artistry, he should have given his award to
Beyonce". On February 26, 2015, he publicly apologized
to Beck on Twitter.On February 8, 2015, at the 57th
Annual Grammy Awards, West walked on stage as
Beck was accepting his award for Album of the Year
and then walked off stage, making everyone think he was
joking around. After the awards show, West stated in an
interview that he was not joking and that "Beck needs
to respect artistry, he should have given his award to
Beyonce". On February 26, 2015, he publicly apologized
